vineyards.name: González Byass
vineyards.address: Manuel Maria González 12, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided tours of historic cellars including the Cathedral bodega and moonlight tastings; multiple tasting packages available by reservation.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1835 by Manuel María González Ángel, this Jerez house produces Tío Pepe Fino and a celebrated VORS range from historic albariza-soil vineyards in the Jerez Triangle.

verified.address_quoted: Manuel Mª González, 12, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera - Spain

vineyards.name: Emilio Lustau
vineyards.address: Calle Arcos 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Bodega visits and guided tastings available by reservation; Almacenista programme showcases small-producer sherries.
vineyards.description: Jerez négociant and bodega known for the Almacenista series of small-producer sherries and a full range of Fino, Manzanilla, Amontillado, Palo Cortado, Oloroso and Pedro Ximénez styles.

verified.address_quoted: CALLE ARCOS, 53, 11402 JEREZ DE LA FRONTERA, CÁDIZ

vineyards.name: Bodegas Barbadillo
vineyards.address: Calle Sevilla 6, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Special tastings and winery visits at Sanlúcar bodega available through the Visits section of their website.
vineyards.description: The largest producer in Sanlúcar de Barrameda, founded in 1821 and still family-owned. Produces the widely distributed Solear Manzanilla alongside a full sherry range from the Miraflores and Balbaina pagos.

vineyards.name: Delgado Zuleta
vineyards.address: Avenida Rocío Jurado s/n, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Winery visit described as a journey through the history of the bodega; available by appointment, contact 609 88 73 00.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1744 and one of the oldest documented wineries in the Marco de Jerez. La Goya Manzanilla is a widely distributed Manzanilla from Sanlúcar.

verified.address_quoted: Avda. Rocío Jurado, s/n - 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda

vineyards.name: Bodegas Herederos de Argüeso
vineyards.address: Calle Mar nº 8, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits to the historic cellars in the Barrio Bajo available; contact bodega directly.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1822 by León de Argüeso, this Sanlúcar bodega occupies 13,500 square metres in the historic Barrio Bajo. San León Manzanilla won the Manzanilla Trophy at the International Wine Challenge in 2017.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Fernando de Castilla
vineyards.address: Calle Jardinillo 7-11, 11404 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits to the Santiago quarter bodega available; tasting packages across Classic, Antique, and Singular ranges.
vineyards.description: Jerez bodega founded in 1837 in the Santiago neighbourhood. The Antique range of dry, unblended sherries from old soleras is produced here.

verified.address_quoted: C/Jardinillo, 7 al 11, Jerez de la Frontera-11404, Cádiz. SPAIN

vineyards.name: Bodegas Tradición
vineyards.address: Plaza Cordobeses 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: The Tradición Experience: guided visits with tasting of VORS wines and an art collection; book via website in English or Spanish.
vineyards.description: Specialist VORS bodega in the historic centre of Jerez, founded in 1998 to focus exclusively on wines aged 20 to 30-plus years in old soleras. Maintains a private art collection alongside the cellar.

verified.address_quoted: Plaza Cordobeses 3, Jerez de la Frontera

vineyards.name: Equipo Navazos
vineyards.address: Jerez de la Frontera, 11402 Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Not a traditional bodega with cellar-door visits; wines available through specialist retailers and online.
vineyards.description: Négociant-bottler founded in 2005 that selects exceptional barrels from established Jerez and Sanlúcar bodegas, releasing them as numbered La Bota bottlings. Over 135 releases to date.

vineyards.name: Osborne
vineyards.address: Calle Los Moros 7, 11500 El Puerto de Santa María, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided bodega visits at El Puerto de Santa María including sherry cellar, brandy ageing rooms and bull sculpture garden; book through website.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1772 in El Puerto de Santa María by Thomas Osborne Mann. The company is known for Veterano brandy, the Silueta del Toro roadside sculptures, and its Bailén Oloroso and Fino Quinta sherries.

verified.address_quoted: Calle Los Moros 7, El Puerto de Santa María

vineyards.name: Bodegas Gutiérrez Colosía
vineyards.address: Avenida Bajamar 40, 11500 El Puerto de Santa María, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Riverside bodega visits available; wines, brandies and vinegars tasted at the waterfront site.
vineyards.description: Riverside bodega in El Puerto de Santa María producing Fino, Amontillado, Oloroso, Palo Cortado and Pedro Ximénez alongside brandies and sherry vinegar from a historic waterfront site.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Hidalgo La Gitana
vineyards.address: Calle Banda Playa 42, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Bodega visits and tastings in Sanlúcar available by reservation; Manzanilla Pasada and La Gitana flights offered.
vineyards.description: Sanlúcar bodega founded in 1792, producing La Gitana Manzanilla from vineyards in the Miraflores pago. A separate family from Vinícola Hidalgo in Jerez.

vineyards.name: Sánchez Romate
vineyards.address: Calle Lealas 26, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Bodega visits available; Cardenal Cisneros PX and Iberia Oloroso tastings offered.
vineyards.description: Family-owned Jerez bodega founded in 1781, producing the Cardenal Cisneros Pedro Ximénez, Iberia Oloroso and the NPÚ brandy alongside a full range of classic styles.

verified.address_quoted: Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain

vineyards.name: Williams & Humbert
vineyards.address: Carretera Nacional IV km 641.75, 11408 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided visits to the largest privately owned winery complex in Jerez; multiple tasting experiences available by reservation.
vineyards.description: Jerez bodega founded in 1877, home to the Dry Sack Medium and Don Zoilo Fino labels. Operates one of the largest winery complexes in the region.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Real Tesoro y Valdespino
vineyards.address: Calle Pizarro 10, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Jerez bodega available; Inocente single-vineyard Fino flight and VORS portfolio offered.
vineyards.description: Historic Jerez estate whose Inocente Fino is fermented and aged in a single Macharnudo vineyard without blending with other pagos, an exceptional practice in sherry production.

verified.address_quoted: Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain

vineyards.name: Pedro Romero
vineyards.address: Calle Trasbolsa 84, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Bodega visits with tasting of Aurora Manzanilla and aged styles available; contact bodega directly.
vineyards.description: Family-run Sanlúcar bodega producing the Aurora Manzanilla under biological ageing in the Barrio Alto quarter, with a focus on unfiltered en rama bottlings.

vineyards.name: Bodegas César Florido
vineyards.address: Calle Padre Lerchundi 35, 11630 Chipiona, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Chipiona bodega by appointment; Moscatel and Manzanilla range tasted.
vineyards.description: Small family bodega in Chipiona, the coastal Moscatel village near Sanlúcar, producing Moscatel de Alejandría wines from sandy soils alongside Manzanilla.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Rey Fernando de Castilla
vineyards.address: Calle Jardinillo 7, 11404 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits to the Santiago quarter bodega available; premium and Reserva range tastings offered.
vineyards.description: A separate label and range from the same Jerez address as Fernando de Castilla, covering the Classic range including Manzanilla, Fino, Amontillado, Oloroso, Cream and Pedro Ximénez.

verified.address_quoted: C/Jardinillo, 7 al 11, Jerez de la Frontera-11404, Cádiz. SPAIN

vineyards.name: Bodegas Yuste
vineyards.address: Avenida Guadalquivir 12, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Manzanilla and aged sherry tastings available at the Sanlúcar bodega; contact bodega directly.
vineyards.description: Small Sanlúcar bodega producing Manzanilla and a Cream sherry from biological and oxidative soleras in the river-influenced Atlantic microclimate of Barrameda.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Dios Baco
vineyards.address: Calle Diego Fernández Herrera 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Bodega visits with tasting programmes available by prior arrangement.
vineyards.description: Jerez bodega founded in 1848 producing Fino, Oloroso and Pedro Ximénez sherries alongside the Oxford Dry Oloroso and a Brandy de Jerez range from old soleras.

verified.address_quoted: Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain

vineyards.name: Pedro Domecq (Beam Suntory)
vineyards.address: Calle San Ildefonso 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: La Ina Fino and Fundador brandy tasting experiences available through the Beam Suntory owned La Ina bodega.
vineyards.description: Historic Jerez house founded in 1730, the La Ina and Fundador brands now operated by Beam Suntory following the dissolution of the original family company.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Páez Morilla
vineyards.address: Calle Caballeros 11, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small family bodega; tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small family-run Jerez bodega founded in 1870, producing traditional Fino and Pedro Ximénez from old soleras in the historic centre.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Caballero
vineyards.address: Calle Fernan Caballero 3, 11500 El Puerto de Santa María, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Bodega visits available at the El Puerto de Santa María historic site; Pavón Fino and Oloroso tastings offered.
vineyards.description: El Puerto de Santa María bodega established in 1830. The Pavón Fino is aged in the port-influenced Atlantic conditions of El Puerto alongside an Oloroso and liqueur range.

verified.address_quoted: El Puerto de Santa María, Cádiz, Spain

vineyards.name: El Maestro Sierra
vineyards.address: Plaza de la Asunción 2, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small family estate; visits by prior appointment only.
vineyards.description: Small family estate in the historic centre of Jerez, founded around 1830, long associated with the Borrego family. Produces extraordinary VORS Amontillado and Oloroso from very old soleras.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Sánchez Ayala
vineyards.address: Calle Misericordia 4, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Gabriela Manzanilla tastings and bodega visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: Sanlúcar bodega producing the Gabriela Manzanilla from biological soleras in the Atlantic-influenced conditions of the Barrameda coast.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Díez-Mérito
vineyards.address: Calle Cervantes 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided bodega visits in Jerez available by prior arrangement.
vineyards.description: Jerez bodega founded in 1876 and known for the Imperial VORS Oloroso and the Don Zoilo range of aged sherries across Fino, Amontillado and Cream styles.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Obregón
vineyards.address: Calle Valdés 7, 11500 El Puerto de Santa María, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Fino and Manzanilla tastings by appointment at El Puerto bodega.
vineyards.description: Historic El Puerto de Santa María bodega producing traditional Fino under biological ageing in the Atlantic-influenced conditions of the port town.

vineyards.name: La Cave Morales
vineyards.address: Calle Santa María 4, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small family producer; visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Jerez producer from the historic centre making traditional Amontillado and Oloroso from old soleras sourced through the Consejo Regulador network.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Vergara
vineyards.address: Calle Guadalete 7, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Manzanilla tastings at Sanlúcar by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Sanlúcar producer with traditional Manzanilla from biological soleras, listed in the Consejo Regulador directory.

vineyards.name: Herederos de Argüeso
vineyards.address: Calle Mar nº 8, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Historic cellar visits available at the Barrio Bajo bodega; San León and Reserva de Familia flights.
vineyards.description: Legacy brand under Bodegas Argüeso, covering the Reserva de Familia range of Manzanilla Pasada from the 19th-century cellars in Barrio Bajo.

vineyards.name: Vinicola Hidalgo
vineyards.address: Calle Banda Playa 24, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: La Panesa Manzanilla tastings and bodega visit available by appointment.
vineyards.description: Sanlúcar bodega producing the La Panesa Manzanilla Especial from the Balbaina pago. Note: a separate entity from Bodegas Hidalgo La Gitana despite sharing the Hidalgo family name and Sanlúcar location.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Urium
vineyards.address: Calle Pozuelo 28, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small artisan bodega; visits by prior appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Jerez artisan bodega founded in 1986 producing Fino, Oloroso and Pedro Ximénez in limited quantities from old soleras, available at specialist wine merchants.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Faustino González
vineyards.address: Calle Alvaro Domecq 11, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Family bodega; visits and tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: Mid-sized Jerez family bodega founded in 1920, producing Amontillado and Oloroso from aged soleras and contributing bulk wines to the almacenista network.

vineyards.name: Bodegas García Jarana
vineyards.address: Calle José Luis Díez 1, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small Sanlúcar producer; tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Sanlúcar bodega producing the Jarana Manzanilla from biological ageing in Atlantic-influenced cellars near the Guadalquivir estuary.

vineyards.name: González Obregón
vineyards.address: Calle Porvera 2, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Traditional Jerez bodega; tastings available by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Jerez almacenista bodega producing Amontillado and Oloroso for the Almacenista programme and direct export channels.

vineyards.name: Bodegas José de Soto
vineyards.address: Calle Ponce 4, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small traditional bodega; tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: One of the older surviving family bodegas in Jerez, producing Fino and old-style Oloroso from soleras dating to the mid-19th century.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Robles
vineyards.address: Camino de la Pitada km 2, 14550 Montilla, Córdoba, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Pedro Ximénez tastings and organic sherry visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: Certified organic producer making Pedro Ximénez and Palo Cortado sherries under the DO Jerez regulations. One of the few organic-certified producers in the denomination.

vineyards.name: Grupo Estévez (Real Tesoro / Marqués del Real Tesoro)
vineyards.address: Calle Pizarro 10, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Jerez bodega complex available by reservation; Inocente and Tio Mateo tastings offered.
vineyards.description: Group that owns Real Tesoro and Valdespino brands in Jerez, producing Tio Mateo Fino and the Inocente single-vineyard Fino de Macharnudo alongside a full VORS range.

verified.address_quoted: Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain

vineyards.name: Bodegas Bay-Alba
vineyards.address: Calle Arquitecto Acero 4, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small Jerez bodega; tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Jerez almacenista bodega contributing aged Amontillado and Pedro Ximénez to the solera ecosystem of the Jerez Triangle.

vineyards.name: Croft Sherry
vineyards.address: Rancho de la Merced s/n, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits available through the González Byass tourism programme at the Rancho de la Merced site.
vineyards.description: One of the oldest names in sherry, founded 1678 and now part of the González Byass group. Produces Croft Original Pale Cream, the wine that created the Pale Cream category in the 1970s.

vineyards.name: Palomino & Vergara
vineyards.address: Calle Colón 1, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Bodega visits by prior arrangement; Tio Mateo Fino tasting included.
vineyards.description: Historic Jerez house from 1765, now operating under the Estévez group umbrella, producing the Tio Mateo Fino alongside aged styles.

vineyards.name: Bodegas de la Riva
vineyards.address: Calle Albaro Domecq 28, 11405 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small historic almacenista bodega; visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: Historic almacenista bodega from 1776 supplying aged Amontillado and Oloroso to the négociant bottling programme of Lustau and other major houses.

vineyards.name: Bodegas García de Velasco
vineyards.address: Calle Porvera 47, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Traditional almacenista bodega; tastings by prior appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Jerez almacenista from 1886 producing Fino and Amontillado for the specialist solera network, with barrels supplied to larger Jerez houses.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Reyes Gutiérrez
vineyards.address: Calle Honda 5, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small Sanlúcar bodega; Manzanilla tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small family bodega in Sanlúcar producing Manzanilla from biological soleras in the Barrio Alto quarter near the Guadalquivir mouth.

vineyards.name: Bodegas Medina
vineyards.address: Avenida Sanlúcar 14, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Manzanilla and Moscatel tastings; visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: Sanlúcar bodega from 1911 producing Manzanilla and sweet Moscatel from the coastal Atlantic-influenced conditions near the Guadalquivir mouth.

vineyards.name: Miguel Martín
vineyards.address: Calle Corredera 4, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small Jerez producer; tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: Small Jerez producer contributing to the almacenista network with Fino and Amontillado from soleras in the historic bodega quarter.

vineyards.name: Sandeman Jerez
vineyards.address: Calle Pizarro 10, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Jerez sherry visits available through the Sogrape group tourism programme; Don Apricot and Character range tastings offered.
vineyards.description: Iconic brand founded in 1790 by George Sandeman. The Jerez sherry operation, now part of Sogrape, produces the Character range of medium-dry and cream sherries alongside the Don series.

vineyards.name: Bodegas La Cigarrera
vineyards.address: Plaza de las Madejas 2, 11540 Sanlúcar de Barrameda, Cádiz, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Small Barrio Alto bodega; Manzanilla tastings by appointment in the historic Barrio Bajo quarter.
vineyards.description: Small Sanlúcar bodega from 1758 producing traditional Manzanilla in the Barrio Bajo quarter, listed in the Consejo Regulador directory.
